pico.population: athlete athletes healthy adult elderly patient trained individuals untrained
pico.intervention_or_exposure: optimal load optimum load load optimization load prescription velocity-based training force-velocity profiling optimal loading
pico.comparator: high load heavy load low load light load moderate load traditional training fixed load
pico.outcomes: maximum strength muscular strength power output hypertrophy muscle thickness athletic performance force velocity 1RM one-repetition maximum muscle cross-sectional area
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: ("resistance training"[Title/Abstract] OR "strength training"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("load"[Title/Abstract] OR "loads"[Title/Abstract] OR "loading"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("optimal"[Title/Abstract] OR "optimum"[Title/Abstract] OR "power"[Title/Abstract] OR "strength"[Title/Abstract] OR "hypertrophy"[Title/Abstract] OR "performance"[Title/Abstract]) NOT (animal[Title/Abstract] NOT human[Title/Abstract]) NOT (rat[Title/Abstract] OR mouse[Title/Abstract] OR mice[Title/Abstract] OR cell[Title/Abstract] OR "in vitro"[Title/Abstract] OR cadaver[Title/Abstract])
